# youtrack_state_bundle (Resource)

YouTrack state bundle resource. This resource manages sets of state values.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "youtrack_state_bundle" "workflow" {
  name = "Workflow States"

  values = [
    {
      name        = "Open"
      is_resolved = false
    },
    {
      name        = "In Progress"
      is_resolved = false
    },
    {
      name        = "Done"
      is_resolved = true
    },
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The state name.
- `values` (Attributes List) Ordered list of state values. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--values))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the state bundle.
- `is_updateable` (Boolean) Whether current user can update this bundle.

<a id="nestedatt--values"></a>
### Nested Schema for `values`

Required:

- `name` (String) state value name.

Optional:

- `archived` (Boolean) Whether this state value is archived.
- `description` (String) state value description.
- `is_resolved` (Boolean) Whether issues in this state are considered resolved.
- `localized_name` (String) Localized state value name.

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) state value ID.
- `ordinal` (Number) Position in the bundle.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import youtrack_state_bundle.workflow <STATE_BUNDLE_ID>
```
